product.title: L'Oreal Paris Makeup Infallible Up to 24HR Pro-Glow Foundation, Sun Beige, 1 fl oz.
featureBullets: Infallible Pro Glow Foundation With Spf: Lightweight and creamy, this long lasting medium-coverage foundation goes on smooth and finishes with a glow that lasts, The hydrating foundation with SPF is ideal for normal to dry skin

Infallible Face Makeup: Everything from the Infallible foundations, contour kits, and powders are professionally formulated for an expert look that lasts for hours on end, so you get color, definition and coverage that lasts

The Foundation Of Your Look: From BB creams to blush, L'Oréal has everything you need for a smooth, even finish, Highlight to illuminate your look, use concealer to hide imperfections or apply contouring makeup for enhanced, defined features

Because You're Worth It: L'Oréal Paris helps you create the look you want with our full line of makeup including foundations, concealers, highlighter makeup, eyeshadow palettes, lipsticks and much more
Perfect To Pair With: Try with our Infallible Pro Glow Face Primer to prepare, perfect and illuminate while it hydrates skin for better makeup application
product.description: Discover the new pro finish of longwear: up to 24 hour wear with a hydrating glow. Lightweight and creamy, L’Oral Paris' Infallible Pro Glow Foundation is a long lasting foundation that goes on smooth with a glow finish that lasts. Hydrating foundation has medium coverage and instantly hides imperfections for a clear complexion. This luminous foundation with SPF is ideal for normal to dry skin. • Up to 24HR Foundation • Hydrating Glow, Medium Coverage • Healthy, Radiant Finish • The New Pro-Look of Longwear Apply to cheeks, forehead, and chin blending outward. Finish with Infallible Pro-Spray and Set for a lasting glow look. Octinoxate 3.01% Warnings. For external use only. Do not use on damaged or broken skin. When using this product keep out of eyes. Rinse with water to remove. Stop use and ask a doctor if rash occurs. Keep out of reach of children. If swallowed, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away.

specification.value: #40,101 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #356 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation provides excellent coverage that's buildable, with a beautiful glowy finish that looks natural on the face. The product is lightweight, blends smoothly, and lasts all day, with one customer noting it holds up well even in hot sun. The color match receives mixed feedback - while some find it matches their skin tone perfectly, others say it's not precise enough.

reviews.reviewTitle: Very lightweight and buildable great coverage glowy
reviews.reviewText: Glowy blendable and buildable non cakey and great coverage very light wearing feels like air
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 21, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Have been using this foundation for yeeeears! Its THE BEST! And wonderful if you're a crier! Ha its waterproof and holds up PERFECTLY!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 18, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I was thoroughly impressed with this foundation. I'm Indian with olive/warm undertones and a NC 35-37 in MAC. I bought the 208 and found it to be a tad light with pink undertones but was able to make it work. I think 209 will work better. I still wore it out and it looked flawless. It is very lightweight but blends smoothly. Reminds me of MAC's water weight foundation but much much cheaper. Loreal basically owns the whole makeup market :) so I can see this on par with high end foundations. I used a beauty blender and set with loreal's setting spray. Recieved so many compliments on my skin! Build able coverage and feels like I had nothing on my skin. I absolutely love it. I have dry skin so I prefer this one over the matte one. Great dupe for many high end foundations. Lasted the whole night and did not melt off in the CA sun.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 17, 2016

reviews.reviewTitle: My go to drug store foundation!
reviews.reviewText: This is very light weight and even moisturizing and looks very natural on my face! Lasts all day and looks smooth to! Best drugstore foundation imo!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 30, 2024

reviews.reviewText: Not a heavy foundation! Goes on like a face cream and gives enough coverage!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 24, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Love this! Gives you the right amount of glow without looking as greasy as the maybelline dewy fit me does.I even threw my Higher end foundations aside for this including my Mac studio fix and Clinique 24hr foundation, which feels heavy and breaks me out. The pro glow feels so lightweight and still gives you excellent coverage and allows ur skin to breathe! UNLIKE the pro matte which feels like cake face and heavy! My only complain is the colours are limited and it oxidizes like hell n gets darker! The which makes colour choice even harder! Hence the reason for four stars! Caramel beige would be my perfect match if it didn't oxidize so I usually buy sun beige and put a few drops of that as well. It also does not last 24hrs but with the right setting powder like Ben Nye and Laura mercier and the right baking technique (dampen sponge pressing powder to not skin) it lasts all day! Nonetheless I still give this two thumbs up cuz foundation is my most difficult beauty product to find with my crazy skin that starts off dry and then goes oily during the day esp as I live in the Caribbean where there is sunshine always!🙂
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 20, 2017

reviews.reviewText: Love this brand have used for years. Covers well but not heavy
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 25, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I usually hate foundation, and must time I spend natural as can’t be bothered with makeup, but my face had a few bruises From standing on a sweeping brush - don’t ask. I had a few outings to goto so I purchased this and the L’Oréal infallible palette Firstly I impressed myself by ordering the right shade. I was expecting to hate this stuff but I wanted the coverage, to all its credit it was awesome, didn’t look like I was wearing foundation and gave a lovely dewy youthful glow coverage. I’m converted. I won’t be wearing this every day as I’m not that type of girl, for the odd night out I will definitely wear this for a more flawless look, as for the rest of the time I really don’t care what I look like and I like my skin to breathe lol. I would recommend this as it did give a lovely finish, it’s comparable to the Refy, infact this May slightly have the upper hand as it’s more dewy. I used a kabuki brush to apply and it went on a dream. I think if you get the correct shade you’ll live this stuff.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on November 18, 2021

reviews.reviewTitle: It melt away when applied to the face and definitely gives a pretty glow finish last for hours.
reviews.reviewText: It's a complete guessing game when trying to order your foundation shade online. Trying to find the best colour match was like Am I 'Sand Beige'? What about Sun Beige ''? But after tested the Sun Beige 208. It was a little bit darker than my usual foundation colour tone (Shiseido Synchro skin glow Golden 4). Actually, maybe I'm more on the Natural Beige 205 (slight yellow town). Overall, I really like the texture of this foundation as it gives a dewy glow to your complexion with the same long lasting finish from morning till evening. This foundation is beloved for its medium, buildable coverage and natural dewy finish or by adding an extra layer to give a heavier coverage. To be honest, I am not sure if it would last for 24 hours as usually my make up will be fully off before then. if you not sure which colour to pick always pick one shade darker than your normal shade. I will definitely purchase L'Oréal Paris Infallible Pro Glow Foundation again, as its good value for money with long lasting results.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on March 5, 2019

reviews.reviewText: This is actually quite nice I've only used it a couple of times, but is nice to use if you don't want to wear full makeup and adds a little glow.

reviews.reviewTitle: Really love the finish of this foundation and definitely recommend if ...
reviews.reviewText: Really love the finish of this foundation and definitely recommend if you can find your shade. Great if you love medium coverage and spf! The shade range does suck and I do wish there were more shades that were more yellow or olive. I'm an nc37 in mac studio fix and barcelona in nars sheer glow, and I bought the shade 208 sun beige.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on March 18, 2018

reviews.reviewTitle: LOVE THIS ITS MY GO TO.
reviews.reviewText: this foundation is light weight but also great coverage. perfect for hot climates. I always get sooo many compliments when I use it. give it a try!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on December 19, 2022
